topic: protein-rich or fatty food and tannin perception
trigger_keywords: mejorar la percepción de un vino con taninos marcados
maridarlo con alimentos grasos o proteicos

steps.label: cause
steps.text: A tannic wine is served with food containing substantial protein or fat.

steps.label: mechanism
steps.text: Tannins interact with food proteins and the food reduces their direct interaction with salivary proteins; fat also changes the tactile contrast.

steps.label: effect
steps.text: The wine's astringency can feel less aggressive and the pairing more balanced.

steps.label: exam_formulation
steps.text: Formative causal formulation: The wine's astringency can feel less aggressive and the pairing more balanced.

_meta.source_note: Inferred formative model - not official WSET assessment or mark-scheme content
